mapper.select:
SELECT e.id, e.equipment_number, e.equipment_name, et.type_name AS equipment_type, e.equipment_status, e.stock_quantity, e.description, w.warehouse_name, s.supplier_name, e.equipment_image, e.qrcode_url FROM equipment e LEFT JOIN equipment_type et ON e.equipment_type_id = et.id LEFT JOIN warehouse w ON e.warehouse_id = w.id LEFT JOIN supplier s ON e.supplier_id = s.id
( e.equipment_number LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR e.equipment_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
AND et.type_name = #{equipmentType}
ORDER BY e.create_time DESC

SELECT e.id, e.equipment_number, e.equipment_name, et.type_name AS equipment_type, e.equipment_status, e.stock_quantity, e.description, w.warehouse_name, s.supplier_name, e.equipment_image, e.qrcode_url FROM equipment e LEFT JOIN equipment_type et ON e.equipment_type_id = et.id LEFT JOIN warehouse w ON e.warehouse_id = w.id LEFT JOIN supplier s ON e.supplier_id = s.id WHERE e.id = #{id}
SELECT DISTINCT et.type_name FROM equipment_type et INNER JOIN equipment e ON et.id = e.equipment_type_id ORDER BY et.type_name
